creator: rea@FreeBSD.org
text:
Sun, Dec 26, 2010 at 03:43:20PM +0300, Eygene Ryabinkin wrote:
> The point is taken, thanks.  Had modified the patch and split the
> vulnerabilities by-port too.  Eventually found that PECL's PHAR is
> vulnerable to a wider range of format string attacks, so it is
> CVE-2010-2094.

Inlined patch wasn't properly recognized by the query-pr.cgi.
Here is the link:
  http://codelabs.ru/fbsd/vuxml/php-5.3.4-and-5.2.15-split-vulns.diff
